content.en:
"Who is he?"

The third realm is confused.

The power displayed by Ye Tian was too terrifying, and he actually cultivated two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

"It's him!"

Some of the third realm transcendent realms recognized it, and one of Ye Tian's innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies was the Jiaye wisdom body that had been snatched at the beginning, and Ye Tian actually practiced it.

Another innate multi-dimensional Dao body is not unfamiliar, it is the black mist multi-dimensional body.

But they were very confused, Ye Tian dared to cultivate the black mist multi-dimensional body, this was not harming the physical body.

Moreover, cultivating two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies will inevitably be repelled, and unless you use special treasures to resist the suppression, you won't be able to live long at all.

Lunatic!

They can only describe Ye Tian like this, he actually destroyed his future, he didn't want to die!

However, they also had to admit that Ye Tian, who possessed two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, was almost invincible in the third realm, and they couldn't compete with Ye Tian at all.

Whew!!!

These third realms did not dare to stop Ye Tian alone, unless multiple third realms joined forces to kill Ye Tiandi, and maybe they could still resist one or two.

"Let him snatch this multi-dimensional treasure gourd, immediately notify the Fourth Realm of the outside world, and let those Fourth Realms stop him!"

The Third Realm thought so in their hearts.

......

"Get out!"

Ye Tian showed his invincible strength, and the multi-dimensional 400 treasure vines that emerged were shattered one after another, and he forcibly came to a multi-dimensional treasure gourd, reached out and grabbed this multi-dimensional treasure gourd.

As this Duowei Treasure Vine was captured by him, Duowei Treasure Vine became even more frenzied, constantly attacking him, trying to kill him.

It's a pity that this multi-dimensional treasure vine only belongs to the third realm after all, even if it is invincible in the third realm, it is even more powerful than Ye Tian, but it can't kill Ye Tian.

Of course, Ye Tian couldn't kill the other party, he could only shatter some of the other party's vines.

Immediately, Ye Tian kept fleeing.

He knew very well that if he snatched a Duowei Treasure Gourd, there was still hope of escaping, and if he snatched too many Duowei Treasure Gourd, there would be no hope at all.

"Don't be greedy!"

Ye Tian quickly fled.

Swish!

In an instant, he rushed out of the sea of dead vines, and he used the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique to seal the aura of the multi-dimensional treasure gourd.

In this way, he rushed out of the sea of withered vines, and those Fourth Realms would have a short period of hesitation, and they would not intercept him at the first time.

Really.

Ye Tian rushed out of the sea of withered vines, and these Fourth Realms did not perceive the aura of the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, allowing Ye Tian to escape from a distance.

But soon, they reacted.

"Stop him!"

Some of the Fourth Realms chased and killed Ye Tian, but not all of the Fourth Realms came to hunt down Ye Tian.

After all, once all the Fourth Realms have left, how can they intercept the other multi-dimensional treasures!

And this time it is a competition between the overlord-level extra-dimensional forces and the extra-dimensional creatures, and they are afraid of each other, and they are afraid that their side will be completely disadvantaged if they leave too much of the fourth realm.

It was because they had a lot of ideas, and in the end, there were only seven Fourth Realms to hunt down Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!!

The attack of the fourth realm crossed over and attacked Ye Tian.

If it is a normal third realm, it will be wiped out in an instant.

But Ye Tian relied on the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies to resist their attacks.

Click!!

His physical body was shattered by the attack of the Fourth Realm, but the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, had a terrifying effect on repairing his injuries.

His physical body was quickly repaired, but at this time, the rejection of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies increased.

"He's not dead!"

These Fourth Realms were also a little surprising.

This kind of third realm is too rare, and countless extradimensional epochs on this side of the Five Thousand Territory have not been born.

"Kill!"

These Fourth Realms are attacking desperately.

Ye Tian knew very well that if he didn't work hard, there would be no hope of escaping at all.

Thereupon.

He burned all the origin (addd) of the extradimensional realm in his body, burned part of his body, and also burned the two innate multidimensional dao bodies, only pursuing the light between moments.

In an instant, Ye Tian's aura increased many times, and he fled across the extradimensional void at a speed far beyond the past.

The speed of this escape even surpassed the existence of these seven Fourth Realms, causing them to lose Ye Tian's trace for a while.

If it is a normal third realm, even if you get rid of the fourth realm for a short time, you will be caught up quickly.

But Ye Tian has the Great Realm Armor Technique of the Fourth Realm, and these Fourth Realms can't even trace Ye Tian's traces.

And the moment Ye Tian got rid of these fourth realms, the other copy bodies responded and took away the multi-dimensional treasure gourd.

He knew very well that even if he got rid of the traces at the moment, there was still a possibility of being discovered, he fled too fast, the aura on the road was still there, and this replica body was too weak to escape far.

Really.

These Fourth Realms were tracked through the breath lock, and they searched with a terrifying soul will, and finally found Ye Tian, who had just escaped.

But at this time, Ye Tian committed suicide directly.

"Damn, this guy killed himself!"

"Why would such an ungodly third realm commit suicide so easily? Could it be a special clone, or is it a powerful fourth realm behind it that controls him?"

"It's not good, he doesn't have a multi-dimensional treasure on him!"

"It's impossible, those Third Realms saw him snatch the Duowei Treasure Hun with their own eyes, I have already contacted those Third Realms just now, and I am sure that there is a Duowei Treasure Hun on him!"

"I can't find it, it was definitely at the moment when he just got out of our tracking, and he transferred the Duowei Baohu away!"

"There is not a trace of deduction, and after such a while, it is impossible to trace it!"

"Let's go, go compete for the other Duowei Treasures!"

Whew!!!

These extradimensional realms are gone.

And the competition on the side of the Withered Vine Forest Sea was even more tragic, and as one after another multi-dimensional treasure gourds were brought out of the Withered Vine Forest Sea, the killings of the Fourth Realm were even more terrifying, and there were many third realms that were affected.

......

Ye Tian snatched a multi-dimensional treasure and left, but his other copy bodies were still watching this matter in the nearby territory.

After some time, the battle for the loot was over, and the news was quickly delivered.

After all, the slaughter was so tragic that in the end, the battle affected many extra-dimensional realms, and the No. 5692 territory was directly shattered by the fourth realm, and several other extra-dimensional territories were also damaged.

The impact of such a big war is too great, and the news cannot be concealed at all.

After Ye Tianda heard the details, he was also shocked, because these overlord-level extradimensional forces had suffered! .
